title: M2 Energy Pty Ltd (trading as Dodo Power & Gas) — Public safety
investigation_objective: M2 Energy Pty Ltd, trading as Dodo Power & Gas, paid $406,800 across six AER infringement notices for alleged breaches of the National Energy Retail Rules protecting customers experiencing hardship: failing to inform three hardship customers of its hardship policy, and failing to have regard to three customers' capacity to pay when establishing payment plans. The AER also accepted a court-enforceable undertaking in which Dodo admitted the breaches and acknowledged broader concerns about its hardship, payment-plan and direct-debit compliance systems.
scope: Paid $406,800 across six AER infringement notices for alleged hardship-obligation breaches; Admitted breaches under a court-enforceable undertaking, alongside acknowledged broader compliance-system concerns; Found by AER's compliance review to have failed to inform hardship customers of its hardship policy
